ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was recorded */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X position in the 3D coordinate system */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y position in the 3D coordinate system */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z position in the 3D coordinate system */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle (rotation around the Z-axis) */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle (rotation around the X-axis) */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle (rotation around the Y-axis) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor or device that recorded the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the sensor or device */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, simulation, external system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., IMU, GPS) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor (e.g., Robot Arm, VR Headset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
